# Caption file for the Maternity gallery.
# One line per image: `filename: caption`
# Blank lines and lines starting with # are ignored.
# Images not listed here get an auto-generated caption.

02.jpg: Together, and then there were three
03.jpg: Best friends and a bump
04.jpg: Surrounded by love
05.jpg: Side by side in the ivy
06.jpg: Drifting on the old timber bridge
07.jpg: Through the garden arch
08.jpg: Mom and her girl, seaside
09.jpg: Barefoot at the water's edge
10.jpg: Little hands on the new baby
11.jpg: Gentle hello
12.jpg: Resting on the jetty
13.jpg: Leading the way
14.jpg: Running to mama
15.jpg: Kisses for two
16.jpg: A quiet glance down
17.jpg: Waiting at the shoreline
